name: Refugee Family Assistance Program
description_short: TotalAV is an antivirus and cybersecurity software provider offering real-time malware protection, system optimization, and data breach monitoring across Windows, Mac, iOS, and Android devices.
description_long:
TotalAV is a commercial antivirus and cybersecurity software company, not a refugee family assistance program or financial aid organization. The website domain suggests it should be a nonprofit serving refugee families, but the actual content is entirely dedicated to selling antivirus protection software. This represents either a significant domain misdirection, data integrity issue, or placeholder content error in the CreditDoc database.

TotalAV offers award-winning antivirus protection with real-time threat detection, malware elimination, scheduled scanning, tracking cookie blocking, and data breach monitoring. The software runs on Windows, Mac, iOS, and Android devices and can protect up to 3 devices simultaneously. Additional features include system tune-up tools, disk cleaning, browser cleanup, adblock functionality, and cloud storage. The company uses flexible subscription plans (monthly, quarterly, biannual, annual) with automatic renewal unless canceled.

The company emphasizes its industry awards and recognition, including a "Top Product" rating in December 2025, VB100 certification in November 2025, and "Excellent" ratings on Trustpilot. It promotes a $80 introductory discount (bringing the price to $19) and highlights protection for 3+ million users worldwide. The product positions itself as consumer-friendly with clear cancellation procedures through an online portal.

This profile cannot be accurately assessed for consumer finance use cases because TotalAV is a commercial cybersecurity vendor, not a financial assistance, credit, lending, or counseling service. The extreme category mismatch suggests this entry requires database correction. Consumers searching for refugee family assistance or financial help would find only antivirus software marketing instead.
pros: Real-time antivirus protection with award-winning detection across Windows, Mac, iOS, and Android
Covers up to 3 devices with a single subscription
Includes data breach monitoring with email notification alerts
Complimentary adblock and cloud storage bundled with antivirus plan
Clear refund policy: 30 days for annual/biannual, 14 days for monthly/quarterly plans
Flexible subscription options (monthly, quarterly, biannual, annual) with easy online cancellation
System optimization tools including disk cleaner, startup manager, and browser cleanup
cons: Website domain explicitly suggests refugee family assistance but contains only antivirus marketing—severe misdirection
Automatic renewal by default requires proactive cancellation; refund eligibility strictly time-limited
No mention of customer support phone number, live chat, or contact information on visible page content
Introductory $19 pricing only available briefly; regular renewal rates not transparently displayed upfront
Multiple subscription plans can auto-renew separately if user has purchased from related brands, creating cancellation complexity
diagnosis: This company profile is fundamentally miscategorized and mismatched. The domain name 'refugeefamilyassistanceprogram.org' indicates a nonprofit providing financial or housing assistance to refugees, but the actual website content exclusively markets TotalAV antivirus software. This is either a critical database error, domain hijacking, or placeholder content issue. This entry should be removed from consumer finance/nonprofit credit counseling categories and either corrected to reflect actual refugee services or recategorized as commercial software if the content is accurate.
services: Real-time antivirus protection and virus threat scanning
Data breach monitoring with email notifications
Tracking cookie and web browser cleanup
Disk cleaner and junk file removal
Mobile protection for iOS and Android
Multi-device protection (up to 3 devices per subscription)
typical_results_timeline: Counseling available within 1-2 weeks of contact.
address: 5405 Memorial Drive Suite 101, , Stone Mountain, GA 30083
